reviews.review_description:
I like the ability to choose sparring difficulties, but I did semi-pro and knocked out the bot pretty easily.

I'd recommend having a "pro" difficulty and improve it two ways. 

1) Have the bot raise his hands up to block right after the first couple hits. I did a 5 hit combo on semi-pro which shouldn't be possible at that level.

2) Have the bot immediately counter punch me after throwing a combo. On semi-pro, the bot didn't take advantage of countering my hooks, even when deliberately making myself wide open after.

All and all, it's a great update to the sparring!
I thought this game would be higher quality and fun but it is low quality anf boring and the tutorial is buttcheecks please give me a refund
